metaDescription: Command R (08-2024) (Cohere), released 2024-08-30 — part of the Command R line. August refresh: ~50% higher throughput, 20-25% lower latency, improved multilin…
overview: Command R (08-2024) is a large language model from Cohere, part of the Command R line. Released 2024-08-30. Scalable R-series model optimized for RAG, tool use, and long context.
What's notable in this version: August refresh: ~50% higher throughput, 20-25% lower latency, improved multilingual RAG/tool use and math/code/reasoning, added Safety Modes; 128K context.
